# notify_register_check | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Darwin Notify ](/documentation/darwinnotify)

- [ notify_register_check ](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_register_check)

-  notify_register_check 

Function# notify_register_check

iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
extern uint32_t notify_register_check(const char *name, int *out_token);
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_register_check#parameters)

`name`(Input) notification name

`out_token`(Output) registration token

## [Return Value](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_register_check#return-value)

Returns status.

## [Discussion](/documentation/DarwinNotify/notify_register_check#Discussion)

Creates a registration token be used with notify_check(), but no active notifications will be delivered.
